underlying_goal: Review, create, and merge a PR for phase 36 on their fork repo, with proper git cleanup afterward
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly targeted the wrong repo (reviewed wrong PR, created PR against upstream instead of fork) and failed to auto-cleanup after merge.
brief_summary: User wanted to review and merge a phase 36 PR on their fork, but Claude repeatedly targeted the wrong repo and missed post-merge cleanup, requiring multiple corrections.
